title: angelica acutiloba subsp. lineariloba
intro: Angelica acutiloba subsp. lineariloba, also known as Asian angelica or Dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in East Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Angelica acutiloba subsp. lineariloba include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Angelica acutiloba subsp. lineariloba can be found in various forms, including tea, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
